summary: A few other developments. Niger formally withdrew from the International Criminal Court, citing selective justice, adding to a string of African exits and deepening debate over the court's legitimacy. Amazon CEO Andy Jassy told Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi that the company would invest $13 billion in India for cloud and AI infrastructure, aiming to support 3.8 million jobs by 2030. And a doctor in Hong Kong performed the world's first robotic living-donor liver transplant, a milestone that could expand access to the procedure.

headlines.title: Twin earthquakes kill 32, injure 700 in Caracas, Venezuela
headlines.summary: Two powerful earthquakes struck Caracas and surrounding cities, collapsing buildings and killing at least 32 people while injuring more than 700. International rescue teams are arriving to assist survivors.

framings.angle: Focused on casualty figures and building collapses in Caracas
Spotlighted rescue efforts and volunteer response in Altamira area
Reported on acting president confirming 32 deaths in nationwide quake impact
Highlighted world leaders offering solidarity and aid after the quakes

headlines.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, feuds with Senate
headlines.summary: President Trump requested billions in funding for the Iran war after a Senate motion rebuking his policy. He canceled a housing bill signing and clashed with Republican senators, threatening the budget's passage.

framings.angle: Stressed budget's uphill fight amid Trump tensions with own party
Focused on Senate feud and cancellation of housing bill ceremony after rebuke

headlines.title: China orders foreign ships near Taiwan, drawing US rebuke
headlines.summary: China's coast guard began issuing commands to foreign vessels on Taiwan's Pacific side this month. The US decried the move as destabilizing, escalating tensions in the region.

headlines.title: Niger formally withdraws from International Criminal Court
headlines.summary: Niger's government quit the ICC citing selective justice, deepening debate over the court's legitimacy. The move adds to recent withdrawals by African nations.

headlines.title: Turkish arms sale triggers face-off between Trump and Congress
headlines.summary: The Trump administration pushes for a rare override to approve a Turkish arms sale ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara. Congress opposes the deal amid human rights concerns.

headlines.title: Amazon CEO announces $13 billion investment in India for cloud and AI
headlines.summary: Andy Jassy told PM Modi that Amazon will invest $13 billion and aims to support 3.8 million jobs by 2030 in India, boosting cloud and AI infrastructure.

headlines.title: Canada discusses joining GCAP fighter jet program with Japan
headlines.summary: Canadian defense minister talked with Japanese counterpart about possible participation in the Global Combat Air Program, as rival European fighter project collapsed.

headlines.title: Iran warns against unathorized Hormuz crossings; Rubio in Bahrain
headlines.summary: The IRGC issued warnings on Hormuz strait crossings as an oil tanker reportedly hugged the coast. Rubio said tolls could spread to other waterways, speaking at a GCC meeting.
